title: Incorporation
metaDescription: End-to-end company incorporation in Vietnam — from foreign-owned entity setup and virtual offices to M&A, shelf companies and offshore structuring.

hero.title: Set up your business in Vietnam, the seamless way
hero.subtitle: From representative office to a fully foreign-owned company, our bilingual experts handle the entire registration process so you can focus on doing business.

sections.heading: One-stop incorporation in Vietnam
body: Setting up a business in Vietnam can be challenging, but it doesn't have to be. InCorp Vietnam simplifies establishment by handling the entire process — from representative office setup to complete company registration — for global companies entering from Asia Pacific, Europe and North America.

Our incorporation practice brings together legal consultation, HR, taxation and accounting under one roof, helping you navigate local regulations and administrative requirements for a legal, long-term presence in Vietnam.

sections.heading: Incorporation services
sections.subtitle: Choose the entry path that fits your strategy — every service backed by InCorp's local expertise.

items.title: Company Formation
items.desc: Register an LLC, JSC, branch or representative office with up to 100% foreign ownership.

items.title: Business Intelligence
items.desc: Decision-grade market, location, supply-chain and due-diligence intelligence.

items.title: Manufacturing Setup
items.desc: End-to-end factory and manufacturing company setup, from site selection to compliance.

items.title: Offshore Incorporation
items.desc: Expand globally, optimize taxes and protect assets across InCorp's APAC network.

items.title: Virtual Office
items.desc: A prestigious Ho Chi Minh City address for licensing and compliance at low overhead.

items.title: Buy a Company
items.desc: Acquire a ready-made shelf company and start operating in as little as one week.

items.title: Transfer Ownership
items.desc: Smooth, legally compliant transfer of business ownership in Vietnam.

sections.heading: Benefits of incorporating with us
items: One-stop solution covering legal, HR, taxation and accounting
Up to 100% foreign ownership available for most business sectors
Deep local market knowledge and regulatory understanding
Swift processes that cut through administrative red tape
Long-term, personal stakeholder commitment to your success
Access to the InCorp Group network across Asia Pacific

sections.title: Ready to establish your company in Vietnam?
sections.subtitle: Let our experts map out the most seamless path for your market entry.
